business_definition: Represents an issued insurance contract between an insurer and a policyholder.
Unique business identifier assigned to the policy.
Official policy number issued by the insurer.
Current operational status of the policy.
Classification of the issued policy.
Date on which insurance coverage begins.
Date on which insurance coverage expires.
Duration for which the policy remains valid.
Version of the issued policy after endorsements.
Simplified business summary of the issued policy.
Represents the legal owner of the insurance policy.
Reference to the canonical customer.
Full legal name of the policyholder.
Classification of the policyholder.
Primary communication channel for policy servicing.
Preferred communication method.
Represents whether policyholder KYC is verified.
Relationship between insured object owner and policyholder.
Indicates whether a nominee has been specified.
Simplified explanation of the policyholder.
Represents the insured vehicle associated with the policy.
Reference to the canonical vehicle.
Registered vehicle number insured under the policy.
Category of insured vehicle.
Manufacturer of the insured vehicle.
Model of the insured vehicle.
Declared value of the insured vehicle under the policy.
Declared usage of the insured vehicle.
Primary garaging location of the insured vehicle.
Simplified explanation of the insured vehicle.
Represents the insured or declared driver associated with the policy.
Reference to the canonical driver.
Indicates whether the driver is the primary insured driver.
Relationship of the driver to the policyholder.
Represents verification of the driving licence.
Represents whether the driver satisfies underwriting rules.
Number of declared drivers under the policy.
Indicates whether a young driver is covered.
Indicates whether a high-risk driver is associated with the policy.
Simplified explanation of insured driver information.
Represents a canonical coverage purchased under the issued policy.
Reference to the canonical coverage selected for the policy.
Official name of the selected coverage.
Operational status of the selected coverage within the policy.
Date on which the selected coverage becomes active.
Date on which the selected coverage expires.
Premium attributable to the selected coverage.
Maximum financial protection available under the selected coverage.
Business explanation describing why the coverage was selected.
Simplified explanation of the purchased coverage.
Represents the complete financial cost of the issued insurance policy.
Premium before discounts
Additional premium charged because of increased risk.
Premium reduction applied before taxation.
Discount earned because no claims were reported during the previous policy period.
Taxes applicable to the insurance premium.
Premium after loading and discounts but before taxes.
Final premium payable including all taxes.
Current payment status of the premium.
Simplified explanation of premium composition.
Represents a modification made to an active insurance policy after issuance.
Unique identifier assigned to an endorsement.
Classification of policy modification.
Date on which the endorsement becomes effective.
Business justification for the endorsement.
Premium increase or decrease caused by the endorsement.
Operational status of the endorsement.
Represents whether the endorsement has been approved.
Period for which the endorsement remains applicable.
Simplified explanation of the endorsement.
Represents continuation of policy coverage after expiry.
Unique identifier assigned to the renewal transaction.
Represents whether the policy qualifies for renewal.
Premium payable for the renewed policy.
Discount applied during renewal.
Commercial offer presented during renewal.
Reminder issued before policy expiry.
Final customer decision regarding renewal.
Operational status of the renewal process.
Simplified explanation of the renewal outcome.
Represents the complete operational lifecycle of an issued insurance policy.
Current stage of the policy lifecycle.
Date on which the policy was officially issued.
Date on which insurance protection becomes effective.
Indicates whether the policy has been temporarily suspended.
Represents whether the policy has been cancelled before expiry.
Business justification for policy cancellation.
Indicates whether the policy has expired.
Represents archival status after policy completion.
Simplified explanation of the policy lifecycle.
Business assessment summarizing the issued policy.
Composite insurance risk score assigned to the policy.
Composite value score representing benefits received.
Composite trust score associated with the issued policy.
Represents adequacy of selected coverages.
Represents fairness of premium relative to risk.
Predicted probability that the customer will renew the policy.
Predicted probability that the policy will lapse.
Represents estimated fraud risk associated with the policy.
Overall health score summarizing policy quality.
Natural-language explanation describing why this policy configuration is suitable.
Recommended additional coverage for the policy.
Represents important protection currently missing from the policy.
Potential improvement identified for the policy.
AI-generated renewal recommendation.
Estimated customer satisfaction score.
Date of latest policy assessment.
Version of assessment methodology.
Human-readable assessment remarks.
Structured explanation of major factors influencing policy recommendations.
Insurance product from which the policy was issued.
Canonical customer referenced by the policy.
Canonical driver referenced by the policy.
Canonical vehicle referenced by the policy.
Canonical coverages selected for the policy.
Reference to the immediately preceding policy.
Reference to the subsequent renewed policy.
Parent policy in case of endorsement lineage.
Derived policy version created after endorsement.
Simplified explanation of policy relationships.
